items.title: Bitcoin Address Types
items.description: Comparison of Bitcoin address formats including Legacy, P2SH, SegWit (Bech32), native SegWit, and Taproot, with guidance on which to use for compatibility, privacy, and future-proofing.

items.title: Bitcoin Protocol
items.description: Survey of the Bitcoin protocol layer including consensus rules, peer-to-peer messaging, mempool policy, and the BIP process for proposing changes.

items.title: UTXO Model
items.description: Explanation of the UTXO accounting model, coin selection, consolidation, dust limits, and how UTXO management affects privacy, fees, and wallet performance.
